title: euphorbia millotii
intro: Euphorbia millotii, also known as the 'candelabra euphorbia' or 'candelabra tree', is a type of succulent plant native to tropical Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Euphorbia millotii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Euphorbia millotii is often prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which can be used to extract its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
